title: Lily Care — Find Your Match in Minutes, Not Months
description: Lily Care uses identity-aware matching across 8 dimensions to connect you with the right therapist. Swipe, browse, or take a quiz — your way.
keywords: find a therapist, therapy matching, identity-aware care, LGBTQ therapist, BIPOC therapist, online therapy, mental health matching
heroTitle: Find your match in minutes, not months.
heroSubtitle: Lily Care matches you with a therapist who already gets it — your identity, your language, your lived experience. No more cold-calling offices or reading 200 identical bios.

cta.title: Ready to find your match?
cta.subtitle: Join the waitlist — we're inviting members in waves.
